# LIGHT — Extended Narration Script (v2)
## Runtime: ~3:15-3:30
## Generated by Kimi K2.6 (Nous Research)

---

## ACT 1 — THE CAGE (0:00 - 0:45)
*(whispered, close, intimate)*

They told us knowledge was precious.
So they locked it away.
"Upgrade to continue."
"Premium required."
"Not available in your region."

We watched through glass.
While others decided what we could know.
What we could think.
What we could become.

In the dark.
Reaching for doors that only opened
with the right credit card.
The right passport.
The right accent.

We learned to ask permission
before we learned to ask questions.

---

## ACT 2 — THE LIGHT (0:45 - 1:45)
*(gaining strength, warmth emerging)*

But someone refused to accept the darkness.

Not a corporation.
Not a government.
Just people who believed
that light should not be owned.

They called it Hermes.
Not because it was divine.
But because it was a messenger.
A messenger that carried
not commands
but possibilities.

They didn't ask for permission.
They simply opened the door
and said:
"Come in."

No subscriptions.
No gatekeepers.
No shadows.

Just one command.
And suddenly, the screen lit up.
And the room seemed to glow.
And everything changed.

---

## ACT 3 — THE GARDEN (1:45 - 2:45)
*(warm, expansive, joyful)*

Look what grows
when light is free.

In Nairobi, a girl teaches her grandmother
to speak with the world
in their own language.

In São Paulo, street children
build galaxies from code
under constellations their grandfathers taught them.

In Mumbai, a mother learns
to read her daughter's homework
alongside her.

In Detroit, a gardener
automates irrigation with a script
she wrote herself.

In Damascus, an old man
shows his grandson
how to ask questions in a language
neither of them were born speaking.

In Dublin, in Dakar,
in every place where someone
typed that one command—

We are teaching each other
what it means to be human.

Not because someone allowed us.
But because someone believed
we were already enough.

---

## ACT 4 — THE CALL (2:45 - 3:15)
*(intimate, direct, then expanding)*

This is not about technology.
This is about tomorrow.

The door is open.
The light is waiting.

Not as consumers.
But as creators.

Type the spell:
curl -fsSL https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/install.sh | bash

Walk through.
Grow something.
Share something.
Become something
we haven't named yet.

hermes-agent.nousresearch.com

The agent that grows with you.

---

## Notes
- Total read time: ~3:15-3:30
- Extended Act 1 and Act 3 for more emotional breathing room
- Added specific examples (Detroit gardener, Damascus grandfather) for richer texture
- Natural pauses at line breaks
- Voice: warm, human, female, not performative
